channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cancer Drugs Repurposed to Target Gut Barrier Damage in Crohn's Disease
item.description: Researchers at the University of Houston have identified a potential new treatment path for Crohn's disease, shifting focus from symptom management to repairing the intestinal barrier.

item.title: Most Federally Funded Health Studies Still Omit Sex-Based Analysis, Review Shows
item.description: Despite a decade-old NIH requirement to account for sex as a biological variable, fewer than half of nationally funded health studies consistently report findings broken down by sex.

item.title: Menopause and the 'collagen cliff': What to know
item.description: Collagen is common in skincare ads, but it's more than a buzzword.

item.title: TBI survivors use psychedelics for symptom relief
item.description: A University of Victoria study finds some TBI survivors self-medicate with psychedelics.
